title: T-039 — Server Actions: setAllergenOverride + V07 validator (NPD-c.5)
prompt:
# T-039 — Allergen override action + V07 validator

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §8.6, §8.10, §12 V07
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Action setAllergenOverride(productCode, allergenCode, action, reason) requiring <dept>.write (Technical or Quality), inserts fa_allergen_overrides row with supersedes_id chaining, then runs cascade refresh; V07 validator returns WARN unless cascade non-null + every override has reason >=10.

## Implementation contract
New apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/set-allergen-override.ts: RBAC check (technical/quality .write or npd_manager bypass), Zod validates (action enum 'add'|'remove', reason min length 10), read current override (if any), set its superseded_at=now, insert new row with supersedes_id, refresh cascade. v07-allergens.ts validator queries cascade view + override audit. Tests cover happy chain, reason validation, V07 gate.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/set-allergen-override.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/__tests__/set-allergen-override.test.ts [create]
- packages/validation/src/v07-allergens.ts [create]
- packages/validation/__tests__/v07.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given existing override 'remove gluten' current, when setAllergenOverride('add','gluten','...reason...') runs, then prior row.superseded_at set, new row.action='add' superseded_at IS NULL, supersedes_id pointing to prior row
2. Given reason length 5, when setAllergenOverride called, then ValidationError with code 'REASON_TOO_SHORT' thrown
3. Given fa.allergens populated and any override has reason>=10, when v07() runs, then PASS; given an override with reason='' due to legacy data, then WARN with details

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests covering chain, reason validation, V07 PASS/WARN
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test set-allergen-override && pnpm --filter validation test v07'

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass dept RBAC
- Do not skip cascade refresh
- Do not allow reason shorter than 10
